name: Test Validation: friends abstract page navigation through tabs.
description: This test verifies that a user can successfully navigate through tabs on friends abstract page.
descriptionHtml: This test verifies that a user can successfully navigate through tabs on friends abstract page.

testStage.description: This test verifies that a user can successfully navigate through tabs on friends abstract page.

steps.name: Clicking signin button in the header
Click on Add friends button on Profile Banner component

items.statusDetails: selenium.common.exceptions.NoSuchElementException: Message: Lazy resolution failed: Element via 'css selector'='div.add-friends > a' not found.; For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#nosuchelementexception
